label: A
text: Mix the combined mixture (banana, butter, egg, self rising flour, sugar, vanilla extract)

label: B
text: Beat (cream) the butter, egg and sugar

label: C
text: Crack the eggs into a bowl

label: E
text: Beat (cream) the combined mixture (banana, butter, egg, sugar, vanilla extract)

label: F
text: Gently combine the butter, egg and sugar

label: H
text: Bake the combined mixture (banana, butter, egg, pan, self rising flour, sugar, vanilla extract) at 165°C

label: O
text: Separate the eggs into yolks and whites
